# Step 1: Select a statistical approach

<!-- source: 07-ai-powered-analysis-workflows.qmd section "Selecting a statistical method" -->

Choosing the right analysis before you touch code: domain knowledge, chain-of-thought, and cross-disciplinary prompting.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge asking an LLM for method suggestions with vs without domain knowledge in the prompt.
:::
